name: Spaghetti Squash Tetrazzini
recipeInstructions:
Squash:
1. Boil the spaghetti squash in a large pot for 45 minutes until soft.
Drain and let cool. Preheat the oven to 190°C (374°F).
2. Divide the squash in half and remove the seeds. Scrape the flesh into
a bowl.
Chicken:
1. In a skillet, boil onion, garlic, clove, parsley, basil, and chicken broth.
Reduce heat and add the chicken breast. Cook for 4 minutes on each side.
2. Remove the chicken. Reduce the broth to about 1 cup (240 ml).
Cut the chicken into strips.
Mushrooms:
1. Sauté shallots or scallions in 2 tbsp (30 g) butter for 2 minutes.
2. Add mushrooms and continue cooking until soft.
Sauce:
1. Melt the remaining butter in a saucepan.
2. Add flour, stirring continuously for two minutes.
3. Gradually add vermouth, a pinch of hot sauce, lemon juice, salt, and pepper
to taste. Cook until thickened (about 4 minutes).
Combine everything with the chicken strips into a greased baking dish,
top with grated parmesan cheese, and bake at 190°C (374°F) for 20 minutes
until lightly browned.
